description: DRILL saturation/absorption breakthrough gate — used by tool/drill_classify.hexa

verdicts.saturated: hash(v_n) == hash(v_{n-1}) — fixpoint reached, genuine discovery signal
verdicts.absorbed: overlap(v_n, primitives)/|v_n| > absorption_rate_max — already known, folded back into atlas
verdicts.ongoing: neither saturated nor absorbed — keep drilling

policy: no LLM judge — hash equality + structural overlap only
deterministic over the same (state, atlas) pair
atlas.n6 is SSOT for primitives/laws — no stub set
